final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand RAN QIU, featuring autumn warmth and natural elements.

Style/medium: editorial poster design, Eastern aesthetic with minimalist restraint, poetic and healing visual language
Composition: generous negative space, shallow depth of field effect, balanced layout with brand mark as focal point
Subject: brand logo "RAN QIU" integrated with natural autumn elements like dried grasses, falling leaves, or organic textures
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn atmosphere with golden hour lighting, soft natural environment suggesting tranquility
Lighting/mood: golden hour (golden time) warm light, soft and diffused, creating a serene and poetic mood
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red) as anchor, #E8DCCB (beige) as base/negative space, #D4A574 (golden brown) as accent warmth
Materials/textures: natural organic textures, soft matte surfaces, subtle grain suggesting handmade paper or natural fiber
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain generous white space; brand colors #8B3A1E, #E8DCCB, #D4A574 must be dominant; suitable for print and digital display
Avoid: cluttered composition, harsh shadows, neon colors, cold blue tones, generic stock photo aesthetic, over-saturated filters
